title: 意志头盔 Wilhelm
subTitle: 密涅瓦的猫头鹰总在黄昏起飞
indexStyle: <style>body{max-width:1180px;padding:36px 28px;line-height:1.65}#header{padding:12px 0 20px;margin-bottom:24px}.title-left .blogTitle{font-family:Georgia,'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:.02em}.avatar{width:58px;height:58px;border:2px solid var(--borderColor-muted);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.10)}.hero-banner{position:relative;height:clamp(230px,29vw,340px);margin-bottom:28px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--borderColor-muted);border-radius:22px;background:var(--bgColor-muted);box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}.hero-banner>img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center}.hero-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:36px;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(9,12,18,.05) 20%,rgba(9,12,18,.82) 100%)}.hero-kicker{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.86}.hero-title{max-width:720px;margin:8px 0 0;font-family:Georgia,'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,46px);line-height:1.18;color:#fff}.home-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 280px;gap:24px;align-items:start}.post-column{min-width:0}.home-intro{margin:0 0 18px!important;color:var(--fgColor-muted);font-family:Georgia,'Noto Serif SC',serif}.SideNav{min-width:0;border:0!important;display:grid;gap:12px}.SideNav-item{border:1px solid var(--borderColor-muted)!important;border-radius:14px!important;padding:18px 20px!important;background:var(--bgColor-default);transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease,border-color .18s ease}.SideNav-item:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:var(--borderColor-accent-emphasis)!important;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}.blog-sidebar{position:sticky;top:24px;display:grid;gap:14px}.sidebar-card{padding:20px;border:1px solid var(--borderColor-muted);border-radius:14px;background:var(--bgColor-default);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.05)}.sidebar-profile{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px}.sidebar-avatar{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}.sidebar-name{margin:0;font-size:17px;font-weight:700}.sidebar-note{margin:12px 0 0;color:var(--fgColor-muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.65}.sidebar-title{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--fgColor-muted);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}.sidebar-links{display:grid;gap:6px}.sidebar-link{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:8px;color:var(--fgColor-default);text-decoration:none}.sidebar-link:hover{background:var(--bgColor-muted);text-decoration:none}.sidebar-arrow{color:var(--fgColor-muted)}@media(max-width:820px){body{padding:26px 18px}.home-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.blog-sidebar{position:static;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media(max-width:600px){body{padding:16px 12px}.blogTitle{display:block!important}.title-left .blogTitle{font-size:20px}.avatar{width:42px;height:42px}.hero-banner{height:220px;margin-bottom:20px;border-radius:16px}.hero-overlay{padding:22px}.hero-title{font-size:27px}.SideNav-item{padding:15px!important}.blog-sidebar{grid-template-columns:1fr}}</style>
style: <style>body{line-height:1.75}#postBody{font-size:17px}#postBody p{margin:1.1em 0}#postBody h2{margin-top:2.2em;padding-bottom:.35em}#postBody blockquote{border-left:4px solid var(--borderColor-accent-emphasis);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:10px 18px}#postBody img{border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.10)}#postBody pre{border-radius:10px}</style>
